misc: Has planted his seeds in four different women in four different decades.
biography: Mikko, a seasoned competitor from Lakeside Golf Vammala, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée. Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Mikko brings a quiet intensity to the course, carefully analyzing each shot and strategizing his every move.

While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him, Mikko's dedication to the sport is undeniable. He has participated in the event on 11 occasions, showcasing a consistent presence and unwavering commitment to the competition. He is not participating in Hector Trophée 2026, although there might be last-minute changes to the field.

Off the course, Mikko is known for his, shall we say, 'fertile' lifestyle. He has often joked that he has planted his seeds in four different women in four different decades. Whatever keeps him motivated, it would seem.
